This '''Mos Eisley [[Droid/Legends|droid]] merchant''' manipulated funds and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] tax codes, and bought droids from [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] to sell to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="Episode IV" />
